description: Hermes AI agent session timeline — tool calls, LLM turns, API requests

options.pattern: ^(PUDA IMRE MOF Status|Dobot Status|Capper Status): running.*$
^(PUDA IMRE MOF Status|Dobot Status|Capper Status): idle.*$

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, 'online' AS "PUDA IMRE MOF Status" FROM telemetry WHERE machine_id = 'imre-mof' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, 'online' AS "Dobot Status" FROM telemetry WHERE machine_id = 'dobot' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, 'online' AS "Capper Status" FROM telemetry WHERE machine_id = 'capper' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, 'Session: ' || event AS "Session" FROM (SELECT time, event FROM hermes_session WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, event AS "LLM Turn" FROM (SELECT time, event FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, event AS "API Request" FROM (SELECT time, event FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, event || ': ' || COALESCE(tool_name, 'tool') AS "Tool Call" FROM (SELECT time, event, tool_name FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN topic IN ('response.queue', 'response.immediate') AND msg_type = 'response' THEN time + INTERVAL '2 seconds' ELSE time END AS time, CASE WHEN topic = 'queue' AND msg_type = 'command' THEN 'queue command' WHEN topic = 'response.queue' AND msg_type = 'response' THEN 'queue response' WHEN topic = 'immediate' AND msg_type = 'command' THEN 'immediate command' WHEN topic = 'response.immediate' AND msg_type = 'response' THEN 'immediate response' ELSE COALESCE(topic, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(msg_type, '') END AS "puda" FROM commands WHERE machine_id = 'imre-mof' AND msg_type IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC

options.content: PUDA IMRE MOF Status Dobot Status Capper Status Session LLM_start LLM_end API_Request API_Response terminal read_file search_files process skill_view execute_code immediate command immediate response queue command queue response

options.defaultContent: No chat turns in the selected time range.
options.styles: .puda-chat-card{display:flex;gap:12px;margin:0 0 14px 0;font-family:Inter,Arial,sans-serif;color:#f5f5f5}.puda-avatar{width:40px;height:40px;min-width:40px;border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;color:#050505;background:#dfff69;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.5);box-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(223,255,105,.24)}.puda-chat-main{min-width:0;flex:1}.puda-chat-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:0 0 7px 0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.puda-speaker{font-weight:800;color:#dfff69}.puda-pill{border:1px solid rgba(223,255,105,.7);color:#dfff69;border-radius:999px;padding:2px 9px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.04em}.puda-time{font-size:12px;color:#d6d6d6}.puda-bubble{position:relative;background:#f3f3ef;color:#151515;border:2px solid #dfff69;border-left-width:5px;border-radius:0 20px 20px 20px;padding:16px;line-height:1.55;font-size:15px}.puda-bubble-text{max-height:156px;overflow:hidden;white-space:pre-wrap;padding-right:92px}.puda-bubble.puda-expanded .puda-bubble-text{max-height:none;overflow:visible}.puda-show-more{position:absolute;top:10px;right:12px;border:1px solid rgba(21,21,21,.35);border-radius:999px;background:#151515;color:#fff;padding:4px 9px;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer}.puda-bubble.puda-expanded .puda-show-more{background:#dfff69;color:#151515}.puda-bubble:not(.puda-overflowing) .puda-show-more{display:none}.puda-prompt{margin-top:8px;color:#aeb4bf;font-size:12px;line-height:1.35;max-height:42px;overflow:hidden}.markdown-html{background:#050505;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.35);border-radius:24px;padding:14px 16px;max-height:100%;overflow:auto}

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, event, COALESCE(NULLIF(CAST(assistant_response AS VARCHAR), ''), NULLIF(CAST(user_message AS VARCHAR), ''), '') AS message FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 12

options.content:
{{tool_name}} {{status}}
imre-mof{{event}}{{duration_ms}} ms 
{{message}}
options.defaultContent: No tool/action calls in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, event, COALESCE(tool_name, 'tool') AS tool_name, COALESCE(status, '') AS status, COALESCE(CAST(duration_ms AS VARCHAR), 'pending') AS duration_ms, CASE WHEN event = 'tool_end' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(CAST(result AS VARCHAR), ''), NULLIF(CAST(error_message AS VARCHAR), ''), 'No result returned.') ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(CAST(args AS VARCHAR), ''), '{}') END AS message FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 16

panels.title: Event Detail (click a point in the Event Timeline above)

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM hermes_session WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 1) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT * FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 1) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT * FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 1) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT * FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 1) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT * FROM hermes_subagent WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 1) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT * FROM commands WHERE machine_id = 'imre-mof' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time - 2000) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 1) AND ('$puda_event' = '' OR CASE WHEN topic = 'queue' AND msg_type = 'command' THEN 'queue command' WHEN topic = 'response.queue' AND msg_type = 'response' THEN 'queue response' WHEN topic = 'immediate' AND msg_type = 'command' THEN 'immediate command' WHEN topic = 'response.immediate' AND msg_type = 'response' THEN 'immediate response' ELSE COALESCE(topic, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(msg_type, '') END = '$puda_event') ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, machine_id, host, subject, cpu, mem, temp, data FROM telemetry WHERE machine_id = 'imre-mof' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 1) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, total_tokens AS "Total Tokens" FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND event = 'api_end' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, event, model, provider, total_tokens, finish_reason FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, msg_type, CASE WHEN topic = 'queue' AND msg_type = 'command' THEN 'queue command' WHEN topic = 'response.queue' AND msg_type = 'response' THEN 'queue response' WHEN topic = 'immediate' AND msg_type = 'command' THEN 'immediate command' WHEN topic = 'response.immediate' AND msg_type = 'response' THEN 'immediate response' ELSE COALESCE(topic, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(msg_type, '') END AS queue_type, COALESCE(cmd_name, '') AS command, status, COALESCE(CAST(step_number AS VARCHAR), '') AS step, username, COALESCE(run_id, '') AS run_id, COALESCE(substr(response_message, 1, 300), '') AS message, COALESCE(response_code, '') AS response_code, COALESCE(cmd_version, '') AS version, COALESCE(host, '') AS host, COALESCE(subject, '') AS subject FROM commands WHERE machine_id = 'imre-mof' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500
SELECT time, event, tool_name, status, duration_ms, error_message FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'imre-mof' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC

title: imre-mof
